de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class AbstractSolverType

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractSolverType
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SolverType

    abstract class AbstractSolverType
extends Object
implements SolverType

      boolean isSupportedVersion()
      Returns whether the currently installed version is supported.

      Directly before the problem description is sent to the solver one can modify the problem string by using this method.

      returns true if and only if the support has been checked for the currently installed solver.

      • isInstalled

      • isInstalled

        public boolean isInstalled(boolean recheck)
        check, if this solver is installed and can be used.
        Specified by:
        isInstalled in interface SolverType
        Parameters:
        recheck - if false, the solver is not checked again, if a cached value for this exists.
        Returns:
        true, if it is installed.

      • getSolverCommand

        public final String getSolverCommand()
        Description copied from interface: SolverType
        the command for starting the solver. For example "z3" if it is registered in the PATH variable, otherwise "ABSOLUTE_PATH/z3"
        Specified by:
        getSolverCommand in interface SolverType

      • getVersion

        public String getVersion()
        Description copied from interface: SolverType
        Returns the current version that is installed, if it has already been checked, otherwise null.
        Specified by:
        getVersion in interface SolverType

      • getRawVersion

        public String getRawVersion()
        Description copied from interface: SolverType
        Retrieve the version string without check for support. Returns null if the solver is not installed.
        Specified by:
        getRawVersion in interface SolverType

      • modifyProblem
